text.title: Gce Instance Templates Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply the gce-instance-templates methodology end-to-end. Each step lists explicit input → action → output and (optionally) a decision-gate.

step.name: draft-template
step.action: Author template with least-priv SA, OS Login enabled.

step.name: harden
step.action: Remove metadata SSH keys; idempotent startup script; no secrets in metadata.

step.name: version
step.action: Suffix template name with version (v2, v3, or date).

step.name: smoke-instance
step.action: Create one-off VM from template; verify boot + service health.
